Records.description: Six-loop equal-mass banana integral in $D=2-2\varepsilon$ dimensions. Related to a Calabi-Yau 5-fold. First case with two non-trivial Y-invariants $Y_2$ and $Y_3$. Seven master integrals $M_0,...,M_6$. The $\varepsilon$-expansion of $M_1$ starts at order $\varepsilon^6$: $M_1^{(6,6)}$ involves iterated integrals over $Y_2$ and $Y_3$, with leading terms $1120\zeta_3^2 - 2016\zeta_5 \ln(q)$. Singular points at $x \in \{4,16,36,64\}$ (i.e. $(2k)^2$ for $k=1,...,4$, but from paper: $S^{(6)} = \{1,9,49\}$ for $l=6$ even). The special local normal form is $\theta_q^2 (1/Y_2) \theta_q (1/Y_3) \theta_q (1/Y_2) \theta_q^2$. Compared against pySecDec with excellent agreement.

Banana family, banana_L6_equal-mass-internal. Banana (sunrise) graph: two vertices joined by L+1 edges, L loops, equal internal masses. Evaluates to Calabi-Yau (L-1)-fold periods; GKZ systems give the all-L structure; eps-factorized at all L.
